response.justification: Maria has strong full-stack engineering experience, entrepreneurial initiative with GISCollective, and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks clear evidence of AI/ML product ownership, cloud platform strategy leadership, or advanced AI credentials — key for a director-level AI strategy role.
strengths: Demonstrated entrepreneurial spirit with open-source AI-adjacent platform (GISCollective)
Broad technical fluency across languages, cloud tools (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes), and systems design
Proven ability to lead technical initiatives and mentor others through workshops and open-source contributions
concerns: No explicit AI/ML product development or research output beyond basic agent infrastructure work
Lacks advanced degree in AI or recognized public expertise in AI strategy or cloud platforms
Limited evidence of strategic customer advisory or enterprise-level AI roadmap influence
